summary: PR #75363 is the canonical adopted automerge candidate. It is open, same-repo branch writable, and non-security, but it is not merge-ready because the hydrated ClawSweeper review still has an actionable Discord REST stale-dropping blocker and the latest repair outcome reports a relevant pnpm check:changed failure. Merge and close are blocked by job frontmatter, so the only safe path is a bounded repair on the contributor branch.

actions.reason: Canonical automerge PR needs bounded branch repair before any merge-capable applicator can continue.
Build an executable repair plan for the deterministic executor.

fix_actions.reason: Codex /review did not pass after 2 attempt(s): Blocked by one merge-risk finding. `pnpm check:changed` and `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed, but the current diff still lets non-message Discord REST mutations enter the stale-droppable background lane.
